$comment: Module manifest — the contract between this module and the Jarvis core (Plugin Architecture / Separation of concerns). Status 'planned': structurally valid scaffold for a future capability.
name: Calendar Assistant
description: Answers schedule questions, drafts event-creation payloads from natural language, and produces a daily agenda summary.

envVars.name: CALENDAR_ASSISTANT_ENABLED
envVars.description: Set to 'true' to enable this module's workflows.

envVars.name: CALENDAR_PROVIDER
envVars.description: Calendar backend (google|microsoft365|caldav). Credentials are configured in n8n, not the repo.

envVars.name: CALENDAR_DEFAULT_TZ
envVars.description: Default IANA timezone for event drafts and agendas.

envVars.name: CALENDAR_ID
envVars.description: Target calendar id for queries and drafts.
